title: Family Code § 33.013
text:
Sec. 33.013. CAPACITY TO CONSENT. An unemancipated minor does not have the capacity to consent to any action that violates this chapter.

Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 436 (H.B. 3994), Sec. 11, eff. January 1, 2016.
chapter_title: FAMILY CODE CHAPTER 33. NOTICE OF AND CONSENT TO ABORTION
